title: Custom Pet Embroidery Hoop – Handmade Pet Portrait Hoop Art, Personalized Cat & Dog Gift
material: Cotton thread on linen, bamboo hoop
metaTitle: Custom Pet Embroidery Hoop | Handmade Pet Portrait Gift
metaDescription: Turn your pet’s photo into a custom hand-embroidered hoop art. 6-8 inch bamboo hoop, linen & cotton. Perfect gift for dog & cat lovers. Order now!
shortDescription: Hand-embroidered pet portrait on linen, set in a bamboo hoop. A heartfelt custom gift from your favorite photo.
fullDescription:
**A Timeless Tribute to Your Furry Friend**

Every stitch tells a story. Our Custom Pet Embroidery Hoop transforms your beloved pet’s photo into a delicate, hand-embroidered portrait that captures their unique personality. Whether it’s a goofy grin, a regal pose, or those soulful eyes, our artisans bring every detail to life with premium cotton thread on natural linen.

**Why You’ll Love It**
- **Handmade with Love**: Each hoop is individually embroidered by skilled artisans, ensuring a one-of-a-kind keepsake.
- **Premium Materials**: Soft cotton thread on durable linen, set in a smooth bamboo hoop (6 or 8 inch diameter).
- **Custom from Your Photo**: Simply upload your pet’s clear photo after purchase, and we’ll handcraft a portrait that feels like a hug.

**Customization Process**
1. **Order & Upload**: After checkout, email us your favorite pet photo.
2. **Artisan Creation**: Our team hand-embroiders the portrait with meticulous care (10-14 day production).
3. **Delivery**: Ready-to-display in a charming bamboo hoop – perfect for wall hanging or shelf decor.

**Perfect for Every Occasion**
- **Gift for Pet Lovers**: Surprise a fellow dog mom, cat dad, or anyone who adores their four-legged family.
- **Memorial Keepsake**: Honor a beloved pet who crossed the rainbow bridge.
- **Home Decor**: Add a personal touch to any room – nursery, living room, or home office.

**Product Specifications**
- **Price**: $48
- **Material**: Cotton thread on linen, bamboo hoop
- **Size**: 6-inch or 8-inch diameter (choose at checkout)
- **Production Time**: 10-14 business days
- **Care**: Gently dust or wipe with a dry cloth; avoid direct sunlight.

**What’s Included**
- 1 custom hand-embroidered hoop art
- Ready-to-hang backing (loop attached)
- Gift-ready packaging (optional note upon request)

**Note**: Due to the handmade nature, slight variations in stitching may occur – each piece is truly unique, just like your pet.
